# Ideas

Ideas are grouped by maturity rather than by topic. A seed idea may be little more than a promising question. A developing idea has enough shape to discuss with students or collaborators. A mature idea is close to becoming a study, grant, paper, or project.

Use the [idea template](template.qmd) when adding a new public idea.

## Status levels

- `seed`: interesting but rough.
- `developing`: partially specified and ready for discussion.
- `active`: connected to current project work.
- `paused`: worth preserving but not currently moving.
- `archived`: kept for context but unlikely to be pursued soon.

## Visibility

The `visibility` field is only metadata. Since this repository is public, all committed content should be suitable for public viewing.
